payload.title: Amazon commits $48 billion investment and digitizes 12 million small businesses in India
payload.summary: Amazon announced a $48 billion investment in India by 2030 and has digitized 12 million small businesses in the country, significantly expanding its market presence and ecosystem influence in a key emerging market.

payload.title: Amazon joins RAISE US coalition to develop AI workforce
payload.summary: Amazon became a founding member of the RAISE US coalition to help workers prepare for AI-driven future jobs, strengthening its position in workforce development initiatives.

payload.title: Amazon supports nonprofits after Venezuela earthquakes
payload.summary: Amazon provided support to nonprofits on the ground following devastating earthquakes in northern Venezuela, enhancing its corporate social responsibility profile.
